scenarios.name: Default command-panel flow with issue close
scenarios.description: Main path: bare invocation with --problem and --issue, no other flags. Exercises default exercise selection, full delegation config, issue-close-on-PASS, and default max-iter=2 / keep-evidence=false behavior.
scenarios.context:
Operator runs from the Alpha4Gate root (C:/Users/abero/dev/Alpha4Gate). SC2 is already running. The .gitignore at the project root does NOT yet contain a .ui-review-evidence entry. Invocation:

  /a4g-ui-test --problem "Fix missing WS broadcast for inline-parsed commands" --issue 12

No --max-iter, --keep-evidence, --exercise-cmd, --record-video, or --record-har are supplied. scripts/live-test.sh exists. The skill resolves paths, ensures the gitignore entry, builds the ui-review-loop delegation with the Alpha4Gate config, and reports the resolved configuration plus the downstream verdict.

scenarios.name: Mode-switch exercise, no issue, evidence preserved
scenarios.description: Edge path: a non-default exercise is selected via --exercise-cmd, no --issue is given, and --keep-evidence is set. Tests conditional exercise selection, no-issue-close reporting, and that absent optional flags are not fabricated while supplied ones are passed through.
scenarios.context:
Operator runs from C:/Users/abero/dev/Alpha4Gate with SC2 running and a .gitignore that ALREADY contains '.ui-review-evidence/'. Invocation:

  /a4g-ui-test --problem "Verify mode dropdown cycles AI-Assisted -> Human Only -> Hybrid without stale state" --exercise-cmd "C:/Users/abero/dev/Alpha4Gate/.claude/skills/a4g-ui-test/exercises/test_mode_switch.py" --keep-evidence

No --issue is supplied, so nothing should be closed on PASS. The gitignore guard should be a no-op (entry already present). The delegation should pass --keep-evidence and the test_mode_switch.py exercise path, but must not invent --record-video / --record-har / --max-iter values.

scenarios.name: Custom iterations with video recording
scenarios.description: Edge path: explicit --max-iter and --record-video override defaults. Tests that supplied numeric/boolean flags are echoed with the supplied values (not the defaults) and threaded into the delegation.
scenarios.context:
Operator runs from C:/Users/abero/dev/Alpha4Gate, SC2 running, gitignore lacks the .ui-review-evidence entry. Invocation:

  /a4g-ui-test --problem "Confirm Mute Claude toggle text flips correctly" --issue 27 --max-iter 4 --record-video

--max-iter is explicitly 4 (must NOT be reported as the default 2). --record-video is set and must be threaded through. No --exercise-cmd, so the default test_commands.py is used. --issue 27 is closed on PASS. --keep-evidence and --record-har are omitted and must not be fabricated as enabled.
